items.title: 雷暴屋顶：路飞决战凯多
items.description: 鬼岛屋顶暴风雨倾盆，路飞与凯多在雷霆之间正面碰撞，画面充满毁天灭地的压迫感。
items.prompt: An explosive fan-comic splash page of Luffy battling Kaido on the rooftop of Onigashima during a violent thunderstorm at night, Gear Fifth inspired elastic power and wild expression on Luffy as he launches forward through black lightning and rain, Kaido in massive dragon-warrior form swinging a kanabo amid storm clouds, shattered tiles flying, lightning illuminating soaked stone and torn banners, dramatic low angle with foreshortened fists and weapon dominating the foreground, crashing waves far below, purple-blue storm palette with bright white electric highlights, intense speed lines, debris and rain streaks, colossal scale, high-energy manga rendering, no readable text, no logos, no watermarks

items.title: 月下竹林：索隆和之国决斗
items.description: 月色洒落在风声呼啸的竹林间，索隆与神秘剑士展开一场凌厉而肃杀的对决。
items.prompt: A dramatic manga illustration of Roronoa Zoro dueling a shadowy master swordsman in a moonlit bamboo forest in Wano, silver moonlight filtering through swaying bamboo stalks, Zoro in three-sword style with one blade clenched in his teeth, green haramaki and dark robe whipping in the wind, razor-sharp slash arcs cutting leaves into the air, fallen bamboo split cleanly in the foreground, mist clinging to the ground, intense samurai atmosphere, elegant asymmetrical composition with Zoro lunging from the left and the opponent framed by moonlight on the right, cool blue-green palette with bright blade highlights, cinematic stillness mixed with sudden violence, refined ink textures, no readable text, no logos, no watermarks

items.title: 天候女王：娜美的雷云神殿

items.title: 雨夜踢击：山治的火焰长街

items.title: 雪原守护者：乔巴的冬岛怒吼
items.description: 暴雪中的悬崖边，乔巴为了守护伙伴化身巨大战力，既可爱又震撼。

items.title: 秘史深处：罗宾与古代图书馆
items.description: 昏暗遗迹图书馆深处，罗宾在崩塌石阶与古老雕像之间追寻失落真相，气质神秘而危险。

items.title: 钢铁船坞：弗兰奇超级出击

items.title: 幽灵舞厅：布鲁克的月夜独奏

items.title: 海流之壁：甚平守港

items.title: 雪中沉默：罗与柯拉松

items.title: 霸气黄昏：香克斯的海崖震慑
